figures.caption: Figure 1. Longevity-LLM shows competitive performance in a range of Longevity Bench tasks. The tested tasks span the domains of transcriptomics, proteomics, and clinical record. Base Qwen-3 14B failed to produce valid outputs on all tasks.
Figure 2. Longevity-LLM is a language model parsing the aging signal in DNAm profiles.
Figure 3. Longevity-LLM captures age-dependent signal in proteomic data.
